architecture_layers.value: Three layers, one hard seam: (1) ENGINE CORE - pure-domain Python (tick, generators, currencies, upgrades, prestige, offline progress), no Discord API calls, no theme content hard-coded; (2) THEME PACKS - themes/<name>.yaml, DATA ONLY against the published schema, bounded multipliers, never code; (3) TOOLING/GATE - the theme-gate validator + tests + CI. Player-visible nouns live ONLY in layer 2 - one in engine code is a bug, fixed on sight.

drift_resolution.value: Source and schema win over prose: engine code + the theme-manifest schema + theme-gate CI are ground truth; when a doc disagrees with them, fix the doc on sight and note it in the session card. Fleet instruction text is canonical at fleet-manager projects/ (version-stamped); a stale local copy loses.

fleet_dark_repos.value: All fleet siblings are public and readable EXCEPT `pokemon-mod-lab` (private — raw-content fetches 404; never read it, never guess about it). Standing read authorization: superbot Q-0272.

fleet_siblings.value: Canonical roster (~19 repos): superbot `docs/fleet-reading-path.md` (repo map + reading tiers) and substrate-kit `docs/adopters.md` (per-adopter kit versions). Key rows — superbot: hub/production bot, truth: `docs/current-state.md` + `docs/fleet-reading-path.md` · fleet-manager: manager seat, truth: `control/status.md` + inbox ORDERs · substrate-kit: workflow kit, truth: `docs/adopters.md` + `CHANGELOG.md` · superbot-next: rebuild target (plugin host this lane ships into) · websites · superbot-games · trading-strategy · gba-homebrew · venture-lab · idea-engine · superbot-idle (this repo) · superbot-mineverse: each carries its truth in `control/status.md` (heartbeat) + `docs/current-state.md` · pokemon-mod-lab: DARK (private, unreadable).

fleet_status_command.value: Clone the hub repo `menno420/superbot` and run `python3.10 scripts/fleet_status.py` — per-seat heartbeat table + manager roster/owner-queue. Reading route: superbot `docs/fleet-reading-path.md` (canonical fleet map).

mutation_seam.value: Everything ships branch -> READY PR -> substrate-gate green -> merge (arm auto-merge at creation; REST-merge on green when arming is unavailable; ONE merge attempt then park READY+green with a flag - never retry around a denial). Direct pushes to main are blocked post-seed. Engine behavior changes only with tests in the same PR; theme packs merge on gate-green alone - that is the core/skin split paying rent.

new_area_ownership.value: New engine modules go in the engine package subtree with tests beside them; new themes are one themes/<name>.yaml each (no code); design docs go under docs/design/ with a status badge, linked from docs/AGENT_ORIENTATION.md; economy parameters land PRE-REGISTERED in docs/design/ before any tuning.

owner_profile.value: The owner designs in fragments and relies on agents to build the fuller shape (understand-and-reflect); volume-first founding doctrine (superbot router Q-0266): maximize correct committed output now - CORRECT over BEST, refinement is consolidation-phase; decide-and-flag reversible calls (Q-0240); real money / external accounts are NEVER self-authorized (six-field OWNER-ACTION instead).

ownership_model.value: Single seat owns this repo (Idle Engine Project); the fleet manager is the only other writer and only in control/inbox.md (ORDER blocks, one writer per file). themes/ accepts data-only packs gated by CI. Cross-repo: read-only via the public raw path (Q-0260); superbot-next owns the plugin contract this repo builds against.

review_ritual.value: Kit enders every session (Model+time line, one genuine session idea, a previous-session review) in the session card; born-red card first commit, flip complete last; @codex is NOT enabled for this repo - do not attempt codex relays until the owner adds the integration.

staleness_review.value: Heartbeat control/status.md as every session's deliberate last step; every doc carries a status badge; any doc claiming live state gets re-verified against HEAD before reuse; the fleet manager's staleness sweep is the external check.

verify_command.value: python3 -m pytest -q && python3 bootstrap.py check --strict (theme packs additionally validate via the theme-gate step once ORDER 000 lands it in CI)
